title: Non-record: Sequential Momentum TTT (val_bpb=1.0116, 3-seed mean, 4xA10G)
body:
## Summary

- **val_bpb = 1.0116** (3-seed mean, std 0.0041)
- **Technique**: Sequential Momentum TTT -- cross-document LoRA EMA during test-time training
- **Architecture**: 10L GQA + XSA4 + EMA + SmearGate + BigramHash + mixed int5/int6 + LZMA
- **Artifact**: 10.85 MB (max seed, well under 16MB)
- **Hardware**: 4x NVIDIA A10G (development); 8xH100 SXM validation pending

### Key Idea

Standard LoRA TTT resets adapter weights between documents. Sequential Momentum TTT maintains an EMA of LoRA weights across document batches, giving similar documents a warm start from accumulated adaptation context. Momentum=0.3 (swept over {0.0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7}).

### Results (4x A10G, 10K iters uncapped)

| Seed | val_bpb | Artifact |
|------|---------|----------|
| 1337 | 1.0147 | 10,810,924 bytes |
| 42 | 1.0069 | 10,841,556 bytes |
| 2025 | 1.0132 | 10,853,748 bytes |
| **Mean** | **1.0116** | **std=0.0041** |

Note: On 8xH100 with MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600, training completes ~7200 iterations (vs 10K uncapped on A10G). Final numbers will be updated after H100 validation.

## Test plan

- [ ] Validate on 8xH100 SXM within 10-min training + 10-min eval budget
- [ ] Update val_bpb numbers with H100 results
- [ ] Confirm artifact fits under 16,000,000 bytes on H100
